<think> I know that Cooking Light is a magazine that focuses on healthy cooking and recipes, and it is published monthly. I also know that it was founded in 1987. Therefore, I can conclude that Cooking Light is the magazine that matches the description of being an American monthly food and lifestyle magazine founded in 1987. </think>
<answer> Cooking Light </answer>
